name: Tomb Stalkers
short_description: Tomb Stalkers is an Arcade Action Puzzle game with fast paced mechanics. Walk around the tombs to open them and reveal their content, you require to get a key and a relic to be able to unlock the exit to the next level. But beware, the sorceress minions are upon you with their unique abilities.
detailed_description:
The lost city of EL DORADO has been found. You've been sent by the British Museum with the mission to recover the lost treasures that have been there for centuries... But no one knew the city was inhabited. The chance to return with riches and fame are in your hands.

Will you face the challenge?

Gameplay Description:

Tomb Stalkers is an Action Arcade Puzzle game like few with fast paced game mechanics. Walk around the tombs to open them and reveal their content, you require to get a key and a relic to be able to unlock the exit to the next level. But beware, the sorceress (living, undead and even gods) minions are upon you with their unique and annoying abilities. Even her will join to the chase if is provoked enough! Each scenario contains secrets and traps to be aware of in your search of riches and fame.

Features:

  • 2 Player Co-op game

  • 25 levels in 5 different scenarios.

  • 3 game modes

    • Arcade Mode: Beat the 25 Levels and try to achieve the highest Score!

    • Original Mode: Play with different game rules each stage.

    • Survival: 1 Life, one chance, are you up for the greatest challenge?

  • Are you able to unlock the secret ending?

  • Compatible with Steam Deck, Steam Input and Steam Remote Play

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
